Class OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B extends OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt.DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<B>
org.springframework.ai.model.tool.DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api.OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, ChatOptions.Builder<B>, StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder<B>, ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>
Direct Known Subclasses:
OllamaChatOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
OllamaChatOptions
protected abstract static class OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B extends OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>> extends DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B> implements StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder<B>
Since:
0.8.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, Nicolas Krier, Sebastien Deleuze

    • enableThinking

      public B enableThinking()
      Enable thinking mode for the model. The model will include its reasoning process in the response's thinking field.

      Supported by models: Qwen 3, DeepSeek-v3.1, DeepSeek R1

      Returns:
      this builder
      See Also:
      • disableThinking()
      • thinkLow()

    • disableThinking

      public B disableThinking()
      Disable thinking mode for the model.
      Returns:
      this builder
      See Also:
      • enableThinking()

    • thinkLow

      public B thinkLow()
      Set thinking level to "low" (for GPT-OSS model).

      GPT-OSS requires one of: low, medium, high. Boolean enable/disable is not supported for this model.

      Returns:
      this builder
      See Also:
      • thinkMedium()
      • thinkHigh()

    • thinkMedium

      public B thinkMedium()
      Set thinking level to "medium" (for GPT-OSS model).
      Returns:
      this builder
      See Also:
      • thinkLow()
      • thinkHigh()

    • thinkHigh

      public B thinkHigh()
      Set thinking level to "high" (for GPT-OSS model).
      Returns:
      this builder
      See Also:
      • thinkLow()
      • thinkMedium()

    • thinkOption

      public B thinkOption(@Nullable ThinkOption thinkOption)
      Set the think option explicitly. Use enableThinking(), disableThinking(), thinkLow(), thinkMedium(), or thinkHigh() for more convenient alternatives.
      Parameters:
      thinkOption - the think option
      Returns:
      this builder

    • outputSchema

      public B outputSchema(@Nullable String outputSchema)
      Specified by:
      outputSchema in interface StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder<B extends OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>>

    • build

      public OllamaChatOptions build()
